calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-18-2021 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-24-2021 Continued To Dec-08-21 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION TO TRANSFER
Off Calendar Jul-08-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
David Streza, Esq. (415-398-0200; dstreza@vmbllp.com) of Vogl Meredith Burke LLP for Defendant, Sunhill Corporation.
No other appearances.

Not argued. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT SUNHILL CORPORATION's MOTION TO TRANSFER venue to Marin County is granted. This is a wrongful eviction action arising out of Plaintiff's tenancy at Defendant's property in Tiburon, California. Plaintiff alleges, among other things, that defendant has failed to recognize the eviction moratorium and a medical order governing plaintiff's access to housing accommodation; has failed to recognize his lease and to keep his parking space free of company vehicles; and has failed to respond to plaintiff's notice of civil disturbances in the complex. Defendant shows that the lease agreement concerning plaintiff's tenancy was entered into in Marin County, and that there is a related unlawful detainer case filed in Marin County concerning Plaintiff's tenancy. The proper venue for this action is in Marin County, where the property is located. (Code Civ. Proc. sec. 392.) Further, because the two proceedings are likely to involve common issues and witnesses, a transfer of venue will further judicial economy and reduce the likelihood of conflicting rulings, and would therefore be in the interest of justice.

Order is signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. =(302/EPS)
